summary: Frontend-only regression test for iteration 17: InventoryCatalog tile click-through wiring for admin+rep, new rep sidebar 'Banner Inventory' entry, and no regressions to iteration 16 flows. All targeted flows PASS.

test_results.admin_inventory_tile_click: PASS - /admin/inventory renders 90 tiles; first tile (global__hero) has href=/admin/inventory/global__hero; click navigates to detail page; calendar-grid + inventory-status testids rendered; reservations & offers sections visible.
test_results.rep_sidebar_banner_inventory: PASS - nav-rep-inventory present with label 'Banner Inventory'.
test_results.rep_inventory_tile_click: PASS - /rep/inventory renders 90 tiles; href=/rep/inventory/global__hero; click navigates to detail; calendar-grid + inventory-status rendered; no ErrorBoundary trigger.
test_results.regression_sidebar_labels: PASS - 'Commercial' (note: sidebar section is 'Commercial', request said 'Commerce'; header brand text is 'Commerce') and 'Project Proposals' both present.
test_results.regression_login_copy: PASS - Login.jsx line 53 contains 'Private Partner Platform' (rendered uppercase via CSS imh-eyebrow class). Initial case-sensitive text check was a false negative in the script.

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar label under admin console reads 'Commercial' but review_request references 'Commerce' — 'Commerce' is actually the brand/console header (AppShell.jsx line 44). Both are present, no fix needed but worth noting.
InventoryCatalog role detection uses user.role check for owner/admin — consistent with AppShell logic. Good.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Rep: victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 wiring fix verified end-to-end via Playwright against public URL. Both /admin/inventory/{id} and /rep/inventory/{id} routes work, tile click-through emits correct href, and InventoryDetail renders calendar-grid + inventory-status. No regressions to representatives profile, sidebar labels, or Login copy.
